channel.title: python on TechNod
channel.description: Recent content in python on TechNod

item.title: Jetson设备配置yolo环境
item.description: 环境 Jetpack 6.2.2 Ubuntu 22.04 Install some dependences and pip sudo apt install python3-pip libopenblas-base libopenmpi-dev libomp-dev libjpeg-dev zlib1g-dev libpython3-dev libopenblas-dev libavcodec-dev libavformat-dev libswscale-dev pip config --user set global.index-url https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/repository/pypi/simple pip install --upgrade pip Install pytorch torchvision # https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/jp/v61/pytorch/ wget https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/jp/v61/pytorch/torch-2.5.0a0+872d972e41.nv24.08.17622132-cp310-cp310-linux_aarch64.whl pip install torch-2.5.0a0+872d972e41.nv24.08.17622132-cp310-cp310-linux_aarch64.whl git clone --branch release/0.20 https://github.com/pytorch/vision torchvision cd torchvision export BUILD_VERSION=0.20 python3 setup.py install --user # 会报错，需要安装cu

item.title: OCR识别图片文字内容
item.description: 使用python-ddddocr库识别图片文字内容 环境： conda create -n py312 python=3.12 && conda activate py312 依赖安装：pip install ddddocr flask Python代码: from flask import Flask, request import ddddocr import base64 import json from PIL
